explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 78 from a base nutrition score of 75. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: extreme fibre density
topPros.explanation: Adds standout digestive and satiety value even beyond the headline nutrient display.

topCons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
topCons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat.

topCons.title: texture can put some people off
topCons.explanation: The gel-like texture is not universally appealing.

topCons.title: usually works best with some preparation
topCons.explanation: Often needs soaking or mixing into something else to shine.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

closing.summary: Chia Seeds has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.useCaseNote: Best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.

nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.

scenes.narrationText: 30.7g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

scenes.narrationText: 42.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for a seed, the best ones punch way above their size.

scenes.narrationText: 16.5g of protein. essential amino acid support is one of the better parts here. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

scenes.narrationText: magnesium at 80% daily value, zinc at 42% daily value, iron at 43% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

scenes.narrationText: the upsides first: extreme fibre density because adds standout digestive and satiety value even beyond the headline nutrient display. can be very filling for the amount used because the gel-forming fibre profile gives it practical fullness value. easy to add into meals because can be mixed into oats, yogurt, puddings, and smoothies without much friction.
